title: Click Confirm and Purchase Flex Consulting.

sections.heading: Required Roles
sections.body:
To raise and view support cases, you must have the appropriate [Atlas User Roles](user-roles):

| Support Cases      | Scope                    | Role                                                                                 |
| ------------------ | ------------------------ | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ |
| Can View           | Project                  | Any user with any role in the project                                                |
| Can Raise          | Project                  | Any user with any role in the project                                                |
| Can View and Raise | Organization and Project | Any user with the Organization Owner, or Organization Read Only for the organization |

sections.heading: Support Comparison
sections.body:
The following table provides a comparison of the different Atlas support plans:

| Support Services            | Basic                                 | Developer                                                                                                                                      | Pro                                                                                                                                                                                              | Enterprise                                                                                                                                                                                                              |
| --------------------------- | ------------------------------------- | ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ | ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| Response Times              | N/A                                   | First response within 8 hours.                                                                                                                 | First response options from 2 hours.                                                                                                                                                             | First response options from 15 mins to 2 hours.                                                                                                                                                                         |
| Technical Support           | Chat Support Monday-Friday            | 24/7 Support via Case PortalChat Support Monday-FridayEnd-to-end database support (advice on data best practices and performance improvements) | 24/7 Support via Case PortalChat Support Monday-FridayEnd-to-end database support (advice on data best practices and performance improvements)Phone SupportProactive customer success management | 24/7 Support via Case PortalChat Support Monday-FridayEnd-to-end database support (advice on data best practices and performance improvements)Phone SupportTailored white glove support and customer success management |
| Customer Resources          | Docs, FAQ, Community Forums           | Docs, FAQ, Community ForumsKnowledge Base                                                                                                      | Docs, FAQ, Community ForumsKnowledge Base                                                                                                                                                        | Docs, FAQ, Community ForumsKnowledge Base                                                                                                                                                                               |
| Training                    | Online training at MongoDB University | Online training at MongoDB University                                                                                                          | Online training at MongoDB UniversityAccess to MongoDB University for Teams                                                                                                                      | Online training at MongoDB UniversityAccess to MongoDB University for Teams                                                                                                                                             |
| Escalation Managers         | N/A                                   | N/A                                                                                                                                            | Dedicated Escalation Manager for urgent emergencies                                                                                                                                              | Dedicated Escalation Manager for urgent emergencies                                                                                                                                                                     |
| Event and Launch Management | N/A                                   | N/A                                                                                                                                            | Proactively ensure MongoDB Support aware of special circumstance                                                                                                                                 | Proactively ensure MongoDB Support aware of special circumstance                                                                                                                                                        |
| Customer Success Management | N/A                                   | N/A                                                                                                                                            | Onboarding, Check-ins, to Quarterly Business Reviews                                                                                                                                             | Onboarding, Check-ins, to Quarterly Business Reviews                                                                                                                                                                    |

sections.heading: Request Support
sections.body:
Based on your support plan, you can request support through the
Atlas console in the following ways:

Basic Support Plan

Paid Support Plans

sections.heading: Request Support
sections.body:
- Click the in-app chat icon in the lower right corner to chat
  with a MongoDB Support representative.

- To view Developer Resources:

  In Atlas, go to the Project Support page.

  - If it's not already displayed, select the organization that
    contains your desired project from the Organizations menu in the
    navigation bar.

  - If it's not already displayed, select your desired project
    from the Projects menu in the navigation bar.

  - Click the Support icon in the navigation
    bar.

  - Click View docs.

  The MongoDB Documentation page displays.

sections.heading: Request Support
sections.body:
- Click the in-app chat icon in the lower right corner to chat
  with a MongoDB Support representative.

- Visit the MongoDB Support Portal and open a private support
  case.

  - For Organizations:

    > **Note:** Only [Organization Owner](<Organization Owner>)
    > can open a support case at the organization level.
    > Organizations with no projects cannot open a support
    > case.

    - In Atlas, go to the Support page.

      - If it's not already displayed, select your desired organization
        from the Organizations menu in the navigation bar.

      - Click the Support icon in the navigation
        bar.

      - Click View plan.

      The [Support](https://cloud.mongodb.com/go?l=https%3A%2F%2Fcloud.mongodb.com%2Fv2%23%2Forg%2F%3Corganization%3E%2Fsupport) page
      displays.

    - Under **Support Cases**, click
      **Create New Case**. The MongoDB Support
      Portal opens in a new tab.

      > **Note:** The first time that you access the MongoDB Support Portal,
      > you might need to wait for a short, one-time organization data sync.

  - For Projects:

    - In Atlas, go to the Support page.

      - If it's not already displayed, select your desired organization
        from the Organizations menu in the navigation bar.

      - Click the Support icon in the navigation
        bar.

      - Click View plan.

      The [Support](https://cloud.mongodb.com/go?l=https%3A%2F%2Fcloud.mongodb.com%2Fv2%23%2Forg%2F%3Corganization%3E%2Fsupport) page
      displays.

    - Click **Create New Case**. The MongoDB Support
      Portal opens in a new tab.

      > **Note:** The first time that you access the MongoDB Support Portal,
      > you might need to wait for a short, one-time organization data sync.

sections.heading: Modify a Support Plan
sections.body:
The following table describes the ways you can modify your support plan
and its impact on billing:

| Action                           | Result                                                                                                                              |
| -------------------------------- | ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| Upgrade or Downgrade             | Your billing changes occur on the first day of the next month.                                                                      |
| Cancel during a trial period     | Your billing stops immediately.                                                                                                     |
| Cancel outside of a trial period | Atlas schedules for the cancellation of your plan at the end of the month and your billing continues until the cancellation period. |

Basic Support Plan

Paid Support Plans

sections.heading: Modify a Support Plan
sections.body:
- In Atlas, go to the Support page.

  - If it's not already displayed, select your desired organization
    from the Organizations menu in the navigation bar.

  - Click the Support icon in the navigation
    bar.

  - Click View plan.

  The [Support](https://cloud.mongodb.com/go?l=https%3A%2F%2Fcloud.mongodb.com%2Fv2%23%2Forg%2F%3Corganization%3E%2Fsupport) page
  displays.

> **Note:** You always have access to the free Basic support plan.

sections.heading: Modify a Support Plan
sections.body:
- In Atlas, go to the Support page.

  - If it's not already displayed, select your desired organization
    from the Organizations menu in the navigation bar.

  - Click the Support icon in the navigation
    bar.

  - Click View plan.

  The [Support](https://cloud.mongodb.com/go?l=https%3A%2F%2Fcloud.mongodb.com%2Fv2%23%2Forg%2F%3Corganization%3E%2Fsupport) page
  displays.

You can see all available support plans and a breakdown of the
features and cost for each plan.

You get a 30 day free trial of the Developer plan. After your 30 day
free trial, you are automatically enrolled in Developer Support at
the estimated cost.

To subscribe to the Developer plan:

- Click Start 30 Day Free Trial under that
  section.

- Review Billing Address.

  If you want to enter a new billing address:

  - Clear Use saved billing address.

  - Enter a new billing address. To learn more, see [Set Payment Method](atlas-payment-method).

  You must update payment method also.

- Review Payment Method and make any necessary
  changes by clicking Edit. If you edit the
  billing address, you must update payment method also.

- Review Cart and make any necessary changes
  by clicking Edit.

To subscribe to the Pro plan:

- Click Select Plan under that section.

- Review Billing Address and make any
  necessary changes by clicking Edit. If you
  edit the billing address, you must update payment method
  also.

- Review Payment Method and make any necessary
  changes by clicking Edit. If you edit the
  billing address, you must update payment method also.

- Review Cart and make any necessary changes
  by clicking Edit.

If you cancel a Developer or self-serve Pro support plan and
later reactivate paid support, billing
charges apply retroactively from the
date that a non-Basic support plan was last active (up to 90
days in the past) unless:

- You cancel Developer support and activate self-serve Pro.

- You cancel self-serve Pro support and activate Pro support that
  is tied to a subscription.

To subscribe to the Enterprise support plan, to pay with an
alternative payment method, or for additional information about
support plans, [contact MongoDB](https://www.mongodb.com/contact/atlas).

sections.heading: Downgrade or Cancel a Support Plan
sections.body: To downgrade or cancel your Paid support plan in MongoDB Atlas, follow these steps:

sections.heading: Step 1: Navigate to the  page for your organization.
sections.body:
- In Atlas, go to the Support page.

  - If it's not already displayed, select your desired organization
    from the Organizations menu in the navigation bar.

  - Click the Support icon in the navigation
    bar.

  - Click View plan.

  The [Support](https://cloud.mongodb.com/go?l=https%3A%2F%2Fcloud.mongodb.com%2Fv2%23%2Forg%2F%3Corganization%3E%2Fsupport) page
  displays.

sections.heading: Step 2: Select a Support Plan.
sections.body: You can see all available support plans and choose to downgrade or cancel your current plan.

sections.heading: Step 3: Follow the prompts to confirm the downgrade or cancellation of your Paid support plan.
sections.body:
> **Note:** If you cancel during a trial period, billing stops immediately.
> If you cancel outside of a trial period, your Atlas plan will be canceled at the end of the month
> and billing continues until then.

sections.heading: Flex Consulting
sections.body:
MongoDB Atlas offers personalized, expert consulting with
Flex Consulting units.

To purchase Flex Consulting units through the Atlas console:

- In Atlas, go to the Support page.

  - If it's not already displayed, select your desired organization
    from the Organizations menu in the navigation bar.

  - Click the Support icon in the navigation
    bar.

  - Click View plan.

  The [Support](https://cloud.mongodb.com/go?l=https%3A%2F%2Fcloud.mongodb.com%2Fv2%23%2Forg%2F%3Corganization%3E%2Fsupport) page
  displays.

* Under Flex Consulting,
  click Buy Flex Consulting.

* Select a level of engagement.

* Click Continue to Checkout and complete steps 3 to 6
  to configure the billing information.

| Field                 | Necessity   | Action                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               |
| --------------------- | ----------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ |
| Billing Email Address | Optional    | Type the email address to which Atlas should send billing alerts.By default, Atlas sends billing alerts to the Organization Owners and Billing Admins.If you leave the Billing Email Address blank, Atlas sends billing alerts to the Organization Owners and Billing Admins.If you specify a billing email address and uncheck Only send invoice emails to the Billing Email Address, Atlas sends billing alerts to the billing email address, Organization Owners, and Billing Admins.If you specify a billing email address and check the box for Only send invoice emails to the Billing Email Address, Atlas send billing alerts to the billing email address only.                                                                                                                                                             |
| Company Name          | Optional    | Type the name of the company for your billing address.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               |
| Country               | Required    | Select the country for your billing address. You can also start typing the name of the country and then select it from the filtered list of countries.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               |
| Street Address        | Required    | Type the street address for your billing address.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    |
| Apt/Suite/Floor       | Optional    | Type an the apartment, suite, or floor for your billing address.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     |
| City                  | Required    | Type the name of the city for your billing address.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  |
| State/Province/Region | Required    | Type or select the political subdivision in which your billing address exists. The label and field change depending on what you selected as your Country:If you select United States as your Country, this label changes to State. The field changes to a dropdown menu of U.S. states. You can also start typing the name of the state and then select it from the filtered list of states.If you select Canada as your Country, this label changes to Province. The field changes to a dropdown menu of Canadian provinces. You can also start typing the name of the province and then select it from the filtered list of provinces.If you select any other country as your Country, this label changes to State/Province/Region. The field changes to a text box. Type the name of your province, state, or region in this box. |
| ZIP or Postal Code    | Required    | Type the ZIP (U.S.) or Postal Code (other countries) for your billing address.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       |
| VAT Number            | Conditional | Atlas displays the VAT ID field if you select a country other than the United States.To learn more about VAT, see VAT ID.If your company's billing address is in a country other than the United States (USA), Atlas typically charges VAT (Value Added Tax) if you do not enter a valid VAT ID Number on your billing profile.IMPORTANT: If your billing address is in Ireland or certain Canadian provinces, Atlas always charges VAT (Value Added Tax), even with a valid VAT ID Number.To learn more about VAT (Value Added Tax) by region, see International Usage and Taxation.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                |

- Click the radio button for Credit Card or
  Paypal.

  - If you selected Credit Card, type values for the
    following fields:

    | Field                        | Necessity | Action                                                                                                                                     |
    | ---------------------------- | --------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ |
    | Name on Card                 | Required  | Type the name that appears on your credit card.                                                                                            |
    | Card Number                  | Required  | Type the 16-digit number that appears on your credit card. American Express uses a 15-digit number.                                        |
    | Expiration Date              | Required  | Type the expiration date for your credit card in the two-digit month and two-digit year format.                                            |
    | CVC (Card Verification Code) | Required  | Type the three-digit number on the back of your credit card. American Express uses a 4-digit number found on the front of the credit card. |

  - If you selected PayPal:

    - Click Pay with PayPal.

    - Complete the actions on the PayPal website.

All projects within your organization share the same billing
settings, including payment method.

To learn more or to purchase Flex Consulting units from a
representative,
see [MongoDB Flex Consulting](https://www.mongodb.com/products/consulting/flex-consulting).

> **Note:** You must schedule consulting hours to use Flex Consulting units.
> When you purchase Flex Consulting, you receive a confirmation email
> with further instructions.
